message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Customer
participant "Device" as Device
participant "DeviceProvisioningService" as DPS #aaf
participant "ProductIoT Hub" as IoT_Hub #0ff
participant "FW Provider" as FW_Provider #f0f

note over Device, IoT_Hub: Device was registered for this product before

== First start ==

Customer -> Device : 1 Switch On/Power Up
activate Device
note right of Device: Booting up
Device -> DPS : 2 registerDevice(callback)
activate DPS
DPS --> Device : 3 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
deactivate DPS
Device -> IoT_Hub : 4 setProperties
activate IoT_Hub
Device -> IoT_Hub : 5 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)

opt Firmware needs to be updated
    IoT_Hub -> Device : 6 updateFWMandatory(URL)
    activate Device
    Device -> FW_Provider : 7 URL.get(OLDFW)
    activate FW_Provider
    note right of Device: Downloading
    FW_Provider --> Device : 8 FW, Checksum
    deactivate FW_Provider
    Device -> Device : 9 CheckChecksum
    Device -> Device : 10 update
    note right of Device: Installing
    Device -> Device : 11 restart
    note right of Device: Booting up
    deactivate Device
end opt

Device -> IoT_Hub : 12 iamNewToYou(deviceId, firmwareversion)
IoT_Hub -> Device : 13 youMayStartSending()
Device -> IoT_Hub : 14 sendData(Data)
note right of Device: Working
deactivate IoT_Hub
deactivate Device

== Claim/Remove ==

IoT_Hub -> Device : 15 youMustRetire()
activate Device
Device -> Device : 16 waits
deactivate Device

opt if Device was not reached
    Device -> IoT_Hub : 17 sendData(Data)
    IoT_Hub --> Device : 18 Not registered
end opt

Device -> DPS : 19 registerDevice(callback)
activate DPS
DPS --> Device : 20 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ERROR, null, null)
deactivate DPS
Device -> Device : 21 NobodyLovesMeMode()

loop once a day
    Device -> DPS : 22 registerDevice(callback)
end loop

== IoT Hub not available ==

loop several times
    Device -> IoT_Hub : 23 sendData(Data)
    IoT_Hub --> Device : 24 NotAvailable/Network Error
end loop

Device -> DPS : 25 registerDevice(callback)
activate DPS
DPS --> Device : 26 callback.RegistrationResult(PROVISIONING_DEVICE_STATUS_ASSIGNED, IoTHubURI, deviceId)
deactivate DPS
Device -> Device : 27 compare IoTHub and change if necessary

note over Device, IoT_Hub: if connection is now successfull, go on. If not and IoT Hub has not changed\nrepeat with low frequency. Also if DPS is not available.

@enduml
```
